data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for suspending grants without uninstalling the extension.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the ability to suspend grants without uninstalling the extension. However, the provided evidence does not include any checks or confirmations regarding this specific functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for this capability, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied or identifying any gaps, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence confirming the ability to suspend grants without uninstalling the extension.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to suspend grants.
